entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0168.10098] The calculation weight between the concept us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations and us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateReconciliationAtFederalStatutoryIncomeTaxRate is -1 in the extension taxonomy. This weight does not match the weight between these two concepts defined in the US GAAP taxonomy which is 1. The calculation weight for this relationship should be updated to match the US GAAP taxonomy.
Rule Element Id:10098 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 3256

property.name: label
property.value: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Percent

property.name: label (en-US)
property.value: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Percent

property.name: terseLabel (en-US)
property.value: Effective income tax rate (in percent)

property.name: verboseLabel (en-US)
property.value: Effective income tax rate

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0168.10098] The calculation weight between the concept us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations and us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateReconciliationStateAndLocalIncomeTaxes is -1 in the extension taxonomy. This weight does not match the weight between these two concepts defined in the US GAAP taxonomy which is 1. The calculation weight for this relationship should be updated to match the US GAAP taxonomy.
Rule Element Id:10098 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 3256

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0168.10098] The calculation weight between the concept us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations and us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateReconciliationChangeInDeferredTaxAssetsValuationAllowance is -1 in the extension taxonomy. This weight does not match the weight between these two concepts defined in the US GAAP taxonomy which is 1. The calculation weight for this relationship should be updated to match the US GAAP taxonomy.
Rule Element Id:10098 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 3256
